rows.label: qev035403_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hey, please! Help me! That monster is
seeing red because we ate its eggs![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035403_MSG0004
rows.name:
All my underlings got eaten too!
I don't even have any ammo left!
I'm completely out of options![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035403_MSG0005
rows.name:
Come on, please? We're fellow BLADEs,
right? Show me that power of bonds that
carefree Quincy was talking about![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035403_SEL0011
rows.name: Unable to abandon the desperate Gus, face the native creature.

rows.label: qev035403_SEL0021
rows.name: Abandon Gus, saying he brought this upon himself.

rows.label: qev035403_MSG0006
rows.name:
Thanks, I owe you one, Chief! I'll
be cheering for you from over here,
so go blow that thing away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035403_MSG0007
rows.name:
Tch... The order changed a bit, but
once I defeat that thing, you're next![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035403_MSG0008
rows.name:
Our Gus Team is the one who's
getting the Crimson Tear up ahead![ST:wait ]
